sentence: Maria beat the cream stiff, but the cream did not become stiff.
Jordan boiled the sauce thick, but the sauce did not become thick.
Priya cut the rope short, but the rope did not become short.
Tomas hammered the metal flat, but the metal did not become flat.
Lena kicked the door open, but the door did not become open.
Omar painted the fence white, but the fence did not become white.
Nina pushed the gate open, but the gate did not become open.
Carlos scrubbed the pot clean, but the pot did not become clean.
Aisha squeezed the sponge dry, but the sponge did not become dry.
Sam wiped the counter clean, but the counter did not become clean.
Sam bought a fake gun, but it was a real weapon.
Priya bought a fake diamond, but it was a real gemstone.
Jordan bought an artificial rose, but it was a real flower.
Lena saw a toy tiger, but it was a real animal.
Omar held a plastic apple, but it was a real fruit.
Nina wore an imitation pearl, but it was a real jewel.
Carlos carried a toy sword, but it was a real weapon.
Maria played a toy violin, but it was a real musical instrument.
